items.text: Japan is planning to purchase 27,500 of Nvidia’s $NVDA Rubin GPUs to build an AI factory to develop a homegrown foundational AI model for robotics.

items.text: R to @NPS_Monterey: Read the event recap ➡️ https://nvda.ws/4wgPzez
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: What a moment for @NPS_Monterey and the public sector. At Converge @ NPS, our CEO Jensen Huang joined federal leaders and ecosystem partners to commission the #NVIDIADGX GB300 system, providing 1,500 students and 600 faculty with on-premises access to large-scale AI computing for research, model training, simulations, and real-world application development. The visit marked a shared commitment to advancing AI education, research, and mission-focused innovation.
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: A hosted RL run took Nemotron 3 Nano from 22% to 91% accuracy on a math task for under $5. Using @PrimeIntellect Lab, the whole loop runs on hosted infrastructure. You check a baseline, train the model until the reward climbs, and retest to confirm it actually learned, ending with a downloadable LoRA adapter. You can also scale this workflow to Nemotron 3 Super and Ultra by changing one line.
items.author: @NVIDIAAI

items.text: RT by @NVIDIAAI: Lower inference costs makes running and evaluating more specialized agents in production more practical. Teams can create agents for specific domains, use evals and traces to measure performance, and adapt the harness as their workflows change.
items.author: @LangChain

items.author: @nvidianewsroom

items.text: The next stage of AI is here for the public sector. At Converge @ NPS, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang spoke about how the NVIDIA DGX GB300 will accelerate AI research, education, and experimentation for @NPS_Monterey. The AI supercomputer will expand access to tools and compute needed to train models, develop applications, and solve complex challenges. This deployment will prepare the next generation of leaders to understand, develop, and apply AI responsibly.
items.author: @nvidianewsroom

items.text: Personalized fan experiences don't have to end at the game. Check out how @LiveX_ai is using NVIDIA AI to blend real-time interaction, customization, and commerce.
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: The Genesis Mission is an investment in America’s future, and NVIDIA is proud to be an industry partner in this initiative to safeguard U.S. leadership in science.   This week, John Josephakis, NVIDIA Global VP for HPC, AI, and Supercomputing, joined leaders at the @scsp_ai AI+ Discovery summit to discuss this effort and the AI infrastructure needed to power the next generation of scientific discovery, innovation, and energy security.
items.author: @nvidianewsroom

items.text: Coincidentally AMD has a product named Verano. Competing with Nvidia's Vera CPU. The pun, Vera No writes itself. It's attached to MI500. It is on 2nm, and generally has more cores, memory. We described it back here in February. https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/cpus-are-back-the-datacenter-cpu

items.text: Last month, the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge wrapped on @kaggle with 5,000+ participants across 4,000+ teams. The community explored techniques for improving reasoning accuracy, here's what we learned 👇

items.text: Nvidia-backed AI infrastructure startup Fireworks AI raised $1.5 billion at a $17.5 billion valuation, noting that its ARR has risen fivefold YoY to surpass $1 billion while daily tokens processed on its platform reached 40 trillion, up 1.67X YoY. $NVDA $AMZN $GOOG $MSFT
items.author: @Beth_Kindig

items.text: Nvidia $NVDA said that with software optimizations alone, it was able to deliver a 5X increase in tokens generated in the same power envelope in just one month.

items.text: The AI era runs on servers. More of those servers are built in Texas. Today, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang joined Wistron Chairman Simon Lin in Fort Worth to open Wistron’s first U.S. facility, producing Grace Blackwell compute boards, with Vera Rubin next.
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: R to @nvidia: Learn more about Wistron’s new Fort Worth facility and the advanced AI systems it will help produce: https://nvda.ws/4pusD8Q
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang joined Wistron Chairman Simon Lin as Wistron opened its first U.S. facility in Texas, producing the GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip. We’re proud to partner with Wistron as its global expertise strengthens U.S. manufacturing and the supply chain behind the AI era.
items.author: @nvidianewsroom

items.text: SK Hynix CEO Kwak Noh-jung: “We forecast that next year will be the worst year in the industry's history from the supply perspective. We still forecast that customer demand will remain higher than our supply capacity even beyond 2030.” $SKHY $MU $AMD $NVDA
items.author: @Beth_Kindig

items.text: Congratulations to the students who competed at the International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO) 2026. 👏 We put Nemotron 3 Ultra to the test to take on the same problems in the same time limit, with no internet or external tools. The IMO team graded its solutions 30/42, above the 29-point gold threshold. 🥇
items.author: @NVIDIAAI

items.text: NVIDIA Spectrum-6, a 102.4-terabit-per-second Ethernet switch built for the Vera Rubin platform, is now arriving across the world's gigascale AI factories. @CoreWeave, @Microsoft, @NebiusAI @SpaceXAI and @Tesla are among the first to bring in Spectrum-6 to accelerate their AI factories. Read the Blog: https://nvda.ws/44AO2nn
items.author: @nvidia
